highlights: CI/CD automation across Azure, AWS & GCP
details: Led CI/CD automation across Azure, AWS, and GCP for multi-team delivery.
Migrated workloads to GKE and EKS with Terraform-based provisioning.
Implemented self-healing, disaster recovery, and hybrid automation.
Developed Google NLP-powered chatbot (QUACK) for ops automation.
Wrote Ansible playbooks for JBoss, Splunk, and RabbitMQ management.
Architected scalable, secure cloud infra on AWS (EC2, S3, ELB, IAM) & GCP.
